---
title: "Margaret Elizabeth Laidlaw"
---

## Margaret Elizabeth Laidlaw

**Dates:** (1855-1884)

### Description

daughter of William Laidlaw, farm bailiff to Anne Sturges Bourne at Testwood, and pupil of Mary Adams in Otterbourne in 1871.

### Biography

[1861, 1871 census; birth and death registers]

### Letters

- Letter from May 20th [1871?[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
